offer: For property managers handling 5–15 properties/month, inefficient inspection management causes delayed maintenance reports. We provide inspection management instead of manual tracking and reporting via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient management of property inspections leading to delayed maintenance reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for inspection data on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inspection data
One-click export of simple maintenance reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
